CreateNat.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md)
CreateNat.name: Name of the NAT gateway, consisting of uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -\_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65
CreateNat.cuNum: Number of CUs for the NAT gateway
CreateNat.ipVersion: NAT IP version type, default is v4
CreateNat.bindEips: One or more EIPs from an EIP or shared bandwidth to associate with the NAT gateway
CreateNat.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing, either Prepaid or Postpaid; required when creating an order, not required for renewal orders
CreateNat.billing.reservation: Reservation info; not required when payment method is Postpaid, required when Prepaid
CreateNat.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreateNat.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection. Default is false, indicating deletion is allowed
